nasb.text: Then he brought me to the inner court by the south gate; and he measured the south gate according to those same measurements.

esv.text: Then he brought me to the inner court through the south gate, and he measured the south gate. It was of the same size as the others.

cnv.text: 他領我從內院的南門進到內院，量了這門，大小與先前的一樣。

ccb.text: 他带我从南门走进内院，量了南门，跟其他门的尺寸一样。
